title: Sort Colors
hints: The array only contains 0s, 1s, and 2s — you don't need a general sorting algorithm
Use three pointers: lo (boundary of 0s), mid (current), hi (boundary of 2s)
This is the Dutch National Flag problem — partition into three groups in one pass
Swap 0s to the front (lo), 2s to the back (hi), and skip 1s
